name: BARNWELL INDUSTRIES INC
business: Barnwell Industries Inc engages in oil and natural gas development, production, acquisitions and sales in Canada, and owns land interests in Hawaii. The company sells crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids under short-term contracts to energy marketing companies. The land investment segment receives payments from sales of residential lots and development rights in Hawaii.
sellsTo: Oil and natural gas purchasers in Canada and the U.S.
Buyers of residential lots in Hawaii

exposures.sentence: Barnwell acquires and develops crude oil and natural gas assets in the province of Alberta, Canada via two corporate entities, Barnwell of Canada, Limited and Octavian Oil Limited.

catalysts.event: Sale of U.S. oil and natural gas assets closed
catalysts.sentence: On August 8, 2025, Barnwell entered into an agreement with an independent third party to sell all of its working interests in its U.S. oil and natural gas assets for a sales price of $2,300,000.

catalysts.event: Sale of Water Resources (contract drilling) closed
catalysts.sentence: On March 14, 2025, the Company entered into and completed the sale of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Water Resources International, Inc.
The Offering closed on November 28, 2025 and the gross proceeds received from the Offering was approximately $2,443,000.
